threats.title: New SparkCat Variant in iOS, Android Apps Steals Crypto Wallet Recovery Phrase Images
threats.summary: Cybersecurity researchers have discovered a new version of the SparkCat malware on the Apple App Store and Google Play Store, more than a year after the trojan was discovered targeting both the mobile operating systems. threats.title: Drift Loses $285 Million in Durable Nonce Social Engineering Attack Linked to DPRK
threats.summary: Solana-based decentralized exchange Drift has confirmed that attackers drained about $285 million from the platform during a security incident that took place on April 1, 2026. threats.title: Cisco Patches 9.8 CVSS IMC and SSM Flaws Allowing Remote System Compromise
threats.summary: Cisco has released updates to address a critical security flaw in the Integrated Management Controller (IMC) that, if successfully exploited, could allow an unauthenticated, remote attacker to bypass authentication and gain access to the system with elevated privileges.
